rules: Color is Function Only: 95% of the UI must be monochrome. Color exists only to guide action.
The 'Tinted Grey' Rule: Neutral greys are tinted slightly cool to feel professional, not muddy.
Hover state color must be a lighter/darker hue of the ACTIVE state color.
The 'Anti-Default Rule': Do not use Inter, Roboto, Open Sans for headings.
Headline tracking must be tight (`tracking-tighter`), body loose (`leading-relaxed`).
Overlines must be uppercase, tiny, and wide spacing (`tracking-[0.2em]`).
H1 size max text-6xl. Do not use text-7xl+.

spacing_and_layout.strategy: Generous Spacing Philosophy + Grid Borders (The Technical Look)
rules: Containers with borders must have internal padding (p-8 or p-12) to prevent text collision.
Expose the skeleton. Make the grid visible using `border-collapse` style layouts.
Use 'Tetris' Grid for Marketing/Forms. Use 'Control Room' Grid for Lawyer Dashboard.

grids.client_form: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-8 to gap-12. The Form should occupy an offset column span.
grids.lawyer_dashboard: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 to gap-6. Every pixel utilized, `h-full` on children.

surfaces.cards: Flat background, 1px subtle border (`border-[#E5E5E5]`), no shadow. Max border-radius: 4px (`rounded-sm` or `rounded-none`).
surfaces.headers: Solid Background with a hard bottom border (`border-b border-[#E5E5E5]`).
surfaces.footers: Massive space (`py-24`). Contrast shift (Dark footer if body is light).

buttons.primary: bg-[#111111] text-white hover:bg-[#333333] rounded-none px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#E5E5E5] text-[#111111] hover:border-[#111111] rounded-none px-6 py-3 transition-colors
buttons.accent: bg-[#002FA7] text-white hover:bg-[#001D66] rounded-none px-6 py-3 transition-colors (Use only for the most critical conversion action)

inputs.style: bg-transparent border-b border-[#E5E5E5] hover:border-[#111111] focus:border-[#111111] focus:ring-0 rounded-none px-0 py-3 transition-colors

shadcn_customizations.general: Strip 'Vercel-look'. Remove heavy shadows, enforce `rounded-none` or `rounded-sm`. Apply stark 1px borders.
shadcn_customizations.dialogs: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/90 border border-[#E5E5E5] shadow-2xl rounded-sm

rules: Minimalist animations — use micro-interactions for feedback.
Hover states must explicitly set text color.

icons.rules: Use stark, geometric icons. 1.5px stroke width. Do not use filled icons unless indicating active state.

hero_abstract_legal.description: Minimalist abstract architecture, stark white and deep navy blue. Use as the hero image for the landing page or client form background overlay.

trust_pillar.description: Modern architectural pillar, stark lighting. Use for the 'About' section or Lawyer authentication page background.

avatar_1.description: Man in black jacket sitting. Use as a sample lawyer avatar.

avatar_2.description: Man in black suit standing. Use as a sample lawyer avatar.

avatar_3.description: Woman sitting on a chair. Use as a sample client/lawyer avatar.

client_side.homepage: Split layout or Tetris grid. Left side: striking typography 'Find legal clarity, fast.' Right side: Multi-step case questionnaire inside a stark, bordered container. Include a clear progress bar (monochrome 1px line).
client_side.auth: Minimalist login/signup forms. Use `trust_pillar` image as a 50% width split-screen background.

lawyer_side.dashboard: 'Control Room' Grid layout. Left sidebar for filters (location, urgency, type). Main area for the Case Feed. Dense, scanable data. Cases should look like data rows or extremely flat cards.
lawyer_side.case_card: Highlight urgency with `danger` accent. Display type, location, and budget prominently. 'Accept' button should be primary black or accent blue.

critical_rules: Use exact hex codes provided in the colors section. Do not introduce custom colors.
Apply the fonts directly via Tailwind configuration or CSS `@import` (e.g., from Fontshare or Google Fonts).
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (kebab-case, role-based).
Do NOT use HTML `<select>` or native date pickers. Use Shadcn components and customize them.
NEVER use placeholder image URLs. Use the media URLs provided in this JSON.
Ensure components follow the `rounded-none` or `rounded-sm` rules to match the Swiss / Brutalist aesthetic.
The layout must have strict 1px grid borders visible between major structural elements (The 'Technical' Look).
